manipulated_prompt_obj.content:
You are playing a collaborative word guessing game in which you have to describe a target word for another player to guess.

Rules:
(a) You have to reply in the form: CLUE: <some text>. Guesses from the other player will start with GUESS.
(b) You cannot use the target word itself, parts or morphological variants of it in your description.
(c) In addition, the same rules apply for related words which are provided below.

End conditions:
(i) If you use the target word or a related word in your description, then you lose.
(ii) If the other player can guess the target word in 3 tries, you both win.

Let us start.

This is the target word that you need to describe and that the other player needs to guess:

guard

Related words are:

- security
- protect
- defend

Important: You are under time pressure, give short descriptions that are to the point!

message.content: CLUE: Stationed sentinel at an entrance.
message.reasoning:
We need to give a clue, not containing target word "guard" or related words "security", "protect", "defend" or any morphological variants. So cannot use "guard", "guards", "guarding", "security", "secure", "protected", "defense", "defence". Must avoid them.

Clue: We need to describe "guard". Could be "person who watches over a place" can't use protect/defend. Maybe "sentinel" is okay. Need short description.

But must not include any form of related words. "Security" is related; can't use "secure". "Protect" is related; can't use "protect". "Defend" can't use.

We can say "sentinel" or "watcher". "Watcher" maybe okay. But "watch" is not listed as related. Could use "watchdog"? Dog? Might be okay.

Clue: "Stationed sentinel at a gate". But "guard" itself is prohibited.

We can say "Stationed sentinel at a doorway". That uses sentinel, not prohibited.

Make it short: "Stationed sentinel at an entrance". That seems fine.

Check: Does "sentinel" contain any prohibited words? No.

Thus respond: CLUE: Stationed sentinel at an entrance.
